description: Session router injection plus three deterministic guards: dispatch placeholder hygiene (the Governor's hook-fire probe expects the dispatch-check deny), the governor gate (dispatch-first: lifecycle skills denied until dispatch-agents ran this session), and the debug hard gate + plan schema on the edit path, plus the post-tool feedback rule (PostToolUse surfaces governor feedback after writes/edits). One dispatcher script, one <rule> arg per entry. Command is a single quoted string — Claude Code runs it through /bin/bash -c, so an unquoted Windows ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} loses its backslashes (args exec-form is joined unquoted and breaks on win32). R2 residual: a command-hook timeout is a non-blocking error (fail-OPEN) and is unfixable, only mitigated.
